title: Session Metrics Artefact
description: Schema for metrics.json — standalone per-run MCE metric scores written by EvalMceBatchStep. Lives next to run_info.json in each run folder (item{N}/r{K}/metrics.json).

schema_version.description: Artefact format version. Increment when the schema changes in a breaking way.

session.description: Session-level MCE metric scores, keyed by metric_id.

agents.description: Per-agent MCE metric scores, keyed by agent_id. Empty in schema_version=1; reserved for future extension.

run_quality.description: Per-run data quality summary emitted by eval_mce (warnings/errors/status).

computed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the metrics were computed.

MetricScore.description: Result for one MCE metric computation.

value.description: Metric score. LLM-as-judge metrics are normalised to [0, 1]; non-LLM metrics (e.g. session_duration in seconds) may exceed 1. Always >= 0, or null when computation failed.

reasoning.description: Human-readable explanation from the LLM judge.

error.description: Error message when computation failed, null otherwise.
